action: tank body, glass, pipes and panel perfectly still; liquid level constant and glow held at steady brightness; only a few small cyan-green bubbles drift slowly upward with a faint shimmer
stone pot and plant base perfectly still; overall plant size fixed; only the upper tentacle tips drift a few pixels side to side with a slow, subtle shimmer on the green edges

Cabinet body, marquee and control panel perfectly still and pixel-crisp; ONLY the CRT screen pixels animate — the invader sprites shuffle 1px side-to-side on an evenly bright blue screen. No dimming toward black, no soft/blurred pixels, no cabinet scaling or drift.

Counter body, base and both stools perfectly still and matte, holding the static's dark-purple palette; ONLY a thin neon light strip along the underside lip of the countertop glows gently up and down in a slow soft cyan-to-purple pulse. No surface starbursts, no vapor, no brightness change on the stools, no whole-object glow.

Scanner ring housing and side panel perfectly still and same size in every frame; only a soft cyan scan-light bar drifts slowly down the interior bed and the top emitter glow pulses gently — no scaling of the frame.

Outer frame, yellow handles, corner bolts and bottom roller housing dead still and identical size every frame; only the horizontal belt slats scroll slowly one notch downward per loop and the roller shows a faint highlight rotating — no housing scaling.
Housing, top cap and blue LED bars perfectly locked; only inside the glass: tiny cyan bubbles rise slowly, water gently shimmers and the little fish drifts a few pixels. No scaling of the tank.

Metal slab, bevels and outer rim completely fixed; only the arrow glyphs animate — their neon glow brightens and dims in a gentle sequence (e.g. a slow chase around the tiles). No change to the pad's size or position.
only the inner circular fan blades rotate slowly clockwise; the square housing, rivets and panel seams stay 100% still and unchanged in size and position
blue flame flickers gently and sways, embers glow softly; the metal mantel frame, pillars and top bar stay 100% still and fixed in position and size

The holographic chess board holds ONE constant cyan colour and constant brightness for the entire loop — it NEVER shifts to green or teal and NEVER pulses or flickers. Metal housing and every chess piece perfectly still. The ONLY motion is a single faint horizontal scan-line sliding slowly downward across the glass. Almost imperceptible.

The neon side tubes change colour crisply frame to frame but stay SHARP and pixel-defined with absolutely NO soft glow halo, bloom or haze; the round speaker grille and display stay crisp; cabinet body, chrome trim and outline perfectly still at fixed size. Every frame as sharp as a clean static sprite.

Housing, robotic arm, side panel and grid frame PERFECTLY still; only the orange/cyan laser focal cross on the blue grid bed glows gently brighter then fades back over the loop. No whole-object scaling, no positional drift, no global dimming of the housing.

Ringed metal base and the glass dome edge PERFECTLY still; only the cyan constellation star-map slowly rotates inside the sphere, with every node and connecting line staying sharp and readable on every frame. No blur, no dissolve, no loss of the line network.

Housing and outer metal ring perfectly static; ONLY the small central core does a very gentle, slow brightness breath — stays a bright steady orange the whole time, never dims toward off and the ring never scales.
molten forge cavity glows and flickers warm orange with small embers pulsing deep inside; the metal housing, top port and panel lines stay perfectly still and razor-sharp

gentle cyan-green bubbles rise slowly through the fluid and the specimen bobs a few pixels while the glass fluid shimmers softly; the dark pod housing, caps and blue LED indicators stay perfectly still and crisp
the suspended humanoid inside the glass glows with a slow gentle cyan shimmer; glass, cap and metal housing stay perfectly still and razor-crisp with no glow bloom spilling onto the frame

All four burner rings hold a STEADY identical soft blue glow the whole loop — no brightness pulse, no colour change, and absolutely NO pattern, cross, X or connecting lines between burners. Cooktop, knobs, oven door and bottom drawer stay completely still and unlit. The ONLY motion is a barely-perceptible faint shimmer on the four rings. Almost still.

UV LED strip pulses gently in brightness with a faint violet glow breathing in and out; metal housing and pipe frame held perfectly still, no scaling, no positional drift, color stays pure violet with no pink or blue shift

Only the liquid contents inside the glass shift gently; the metal tank body, rim, pipes and every panel line stay perfectly still and RAZOR SHARP with no blur or glow bloom in any frame — keep all edges crisp and pixel-defined every frame.

Only a thin bright crisp electric arc crackles at the top; the coil housing, rings, base and panel lines stay perfectly still and RAZOR SHARP in every frame, no soft glow bloom or haze on the metal, edges crisp and pixel-defined.
